creator: ltning-freebsd@anduin.net
text:
With the recent update to 7.9, it now works again.

I have no idea what changed, but ... excellent :)
Now if it would not be necessary to build electron+this myself .. I suspect a *lot* of people are prevented from using it because it's not on the package builders. But that's probably a much longer discussion..

Thanks, Mikael and Hiroki!

/Eirik
